name: codex-logfire-exporter
description: Export Codex activity traces to Logfire via direct OTLP spans.

interface.shortDescription: Export Codex activity traces to Logfire.
interface.longDescription: Captures Codex lifecycle hook events, stores lightweight turn fragments locally, and exports completed turns and tool calls to Logfire as direct OTLP spans.
defaultPrompt: Check whether Codex Logfire Exporter hooks are installed.
